visual_description: A dimly lit, narrow room, possibly a back office or a small shop, is filled with several men. In the center, a man in a dark suit and tie stands with his hands clasped, facing a group of other men. To the left, another man sits at a desk, while a bald man in a light-colored shirt stands with his back to the camera, observing the group.
audio_description: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score plays, creating a tense atmosphere.
